    C

    checkEmailAddress(String) - Static method in class inputValidation.EmailAddressRecognizer
    This method is a mechanical transformation of a Finite State Machine diagram into a Java method.
    checkForValidPassword(String) - Static method in class inputValidation.PasswordRecognizer
    This method simply checks if the password passed as input has the desired length.
    checkForValidUserName(String) - Static method in class inputValidation.UserNameRecognizer
    This method is a mechanical transformation of a Finite State Machine diagram into a Java method.
